name: Indaptus Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing Vγ9δ2 T cell therapies for cancer. The company's technology platform aims to harness the natural ability of Vγ9δ2 T cells to recognize and kill cancer cells. Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. is headquartered in New York, NY.
